52-week extension — at 87% of the 52-week range, the stock is one bad print away from a 10–15% reset back into the middle of the range. Position size accordingly.

bottom_line:
BULLISH. Twilio Inc. (TWLO) printed $1.41B in revenue in FY2026 Q1 (+20.0% YoY), net margin of 6.4%. Management credibility is strong (MCS 0.80, 4B/0H/1M record), supporting take-up of the forward guide. At 22.0x forward P/E, the stock carries a 54% premium to peers (14.3x median) — the multiple needs continued execution to defend.
